abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏已成为将推理能力和领域专长从前沿大语言模型（LLMs）转移到更小、可部署的学生模型的主要机制。然而，主流范式仍然是\textit{离策略}的：学生模型在静态教师生成的数据上训练，在学习过程中从未遇到自己的错误。这种训练-测试不匹配，即\textit{曝光偏差}的一个实例，导致预测误差在推理时自回归地累积。同策略蒸馏（OPD）通过让学生模型生成自己的轨迹并对这些自生成输出接收教师反馈来解决此问题，将蒸馏建立在交互式模仿学习理论的基础上。尽管在散度最小化、奖励引导学习和自对弈方面迅速发展，OPD文献仍然碎片化，缺乏统一处理。本调查首次提供了针对大语言模型的OPD全面概述。我们引入了针对同策略样本的统一$f$-散度框架，并沿三个正交维度组织该领域：\emph{反馈信号}（基于logit、基于结果或自对弈）、\emph{教师访问}（白盒、黑盒或无教师）和\emph{损失粒度}（词元级、序列级或混合）。我们系统分析代表性方法，检查工业部署，并识别开放问题，包括蒸馏缩放定律、不确定性感知反馈和智能体级蒸馏。

title: LinguDistill: Recovering Linguistic Ability in Vision- Language Models via Selective Cross-Modal Distillation
authors: Patrick Amadeus Irawan, Erland Hilman Fuadi, Shanu Kumar, Alham Fikri Aji, Yova Kementchedjhieva
abstract: Adapting pretrained language models (LMs) into vision-language models (VLMs) can degrade their native linguistic capability due to representation shift and cross-modal interference introduced during multimodal adaptation. Such loss is difficult to recover, even with targeted task-specific fine-tuning using standard objectives. Prior recovery approaches typically introduce additional modules that act as intermediate alignment layers to maintain or isolate modality-specific subspaces, which increases architectural complexity, adds parameters at inference time, and limits flexibility across models and settings. We propose LinguDistill, an adapter-free distillation method that restores linguistic capability by utilizing the original frozen LM as a teacher. We overcome the key challenge of enabling vision-conditioned teacher supervision by introducing layer-wise KV-cache sharing, which exposes the teacher to the student's multimodal representations without modifying the architecture of either model. We then selectively distill the teacher's strong linguistic signal on language-intensive data to recover language capability, while preserving the student's visual grounding on multimodal tasks. As a result, LinguDistill recovers $\sim$10% of the performance lost on language and knowledge benchmarks, while maintaining comparable performance on vision-heavy tasks. Our findings demonstrate that linguistic capability can be recovered without additional modules, providing an efficient and practical solution to modality-specific degradation in multimodal models.
reason: 论文核心贡献为多模态模型中的跨模态蒸馏与能力恢复，涉及模型架构优化（KV-cache共享）与选择性蒸馏策略。该工作与用户指定的两个研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、推测性解码）在技术目标和关键词上均无直接重叠，属于多模态模型优化与知识蒸馏的通用范畴。尽管论文质量较高、方法新颖且实验有效，但因其不涉及数据 curation/filtering 或解码加速，与用户研究焦点相关性低。
abstract_zh: 将预训练语言模型适配为视觉-语言模型可能会损害其原有的语言能力，这是由于在跨模态适应过程中产生的表示偏移与跨模态干扰所致。此类损失难以通过标准目标的任务特定微调来恢复。先前的恢复方法通常引入额外的模块作为中间对齐层，以维持或隔离模态专属子空间，但这会增加架构复杂性、在推理时添加参数，并限制跨模型与跨设置的灵活性。我们提出LinguDistill，一种无需适配器的蒸馏方法，通过利用原始冻结的语言模型作为教师模型来恢复语言能力。我们通过引入层间KV缓存共享，克服了实现视觉条件化教师监督的关键挑战——该方法使教师模型能够接触学生的多模态表示，而无需修改任一模型的架构。随后，我们在语言密集型数据上选择性地蒸馏教师模型的强语言信号以恢复语言能力，同时保留学生在多模态任务上的视觉 grounding 能力。结果，LinguDistill 在语言与知识基准测试中恢复了约10%的性能损失，同时在视觉密集型任务上保持了可比的性能。我们的研究证明，无需额外模块即可恢复语言能力，为多模态模型中的模态专属退化问题提供了高效且实用的解决方案。

title: Beyond Symbolic Solving: Multi Chain-of-Thought Voting for Geometric Reasoning in Large Language Models
authors: Md. Abu Bakor Siddique, Shahrin Hossain, Sadman Ahmed Siam, Syed Rifat Raiyan, Hasan Mahmud, Md Kamrul Hasan
abstract: Geometric Problem Solving (GPS) remains at the heart of enhancing mathematical reasoning in large language models because it requires the combination of diagrammatic understanding, symbolic manipulation and logical inference. In existing literature, researchers have chiefly focused on synchronising the diagram descriptions with text literals and solving the problem. In this vein, they have either taken a neural, symbolic or neuro-symbolic approach. But this solves only the first two of the requirements, namely diagrammatic understanding and symbolic manipulation, while leaving logical inference underdeveloped. The logical inference is often limited to one chain-of-thought (CoT). To address this weakness in hitherto existing models, this paper proposes MARS-GPS, that generates multiple parallel reasoning rollouts augmented with Python code execution for numerical verification, ranks them using token-level entropy as a confidence signal, and aggregates answers through a multi-stage voting and self-verification pipeline. Empirical results show that MARS-GPS with 8 parallel rollouts achieves 88.8% on Geometry3K, a nearly +11% improvement over the prior state-of-the-art, with accuracy scaling consistently as the number of rollouts increases from 1 to 16 (+6.0% on ablation subset). We provide our code and data in an anonymous repository: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/MARS-GPS-DE55.
reason: 该论文的核心贡献在于通过多并行推理路径、代码执行验证与投票机制来增强大语言模型在几何推理任务上的逻辑推断能力。其方法聚焦于推理（inference）阶段的优化，与用户研究的两大方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、推测解码）在技术目标和关键词上均无直接重叠。论文质量较高，实验设计充分，在特定任务上取得了显著提升，但因其方法论与用户关注的‘数据筛选/管理’或‘解码加速’无关，故相关性低。
abstract_zh: 几何问题求解（GPS）是提升大语言模型数学推理能力的核心，因为它需要结合图表理解、符号操作和逻辑推理。在现有研究中，研究者主要集中于协调图表描述与文本表述并求解问题，其方法可分为神经、符号或神经符号途径。但这仅满足了前两项要求（图表理解与符号操作），而逻辑推理环节仍显薄弱——通常仅依赖于单一的思维链（CoT）。针对现有模型的这一缺陷，本文提出MARS-GPS方法：它生成多条并行的推理路径，并利用Python代码执行进行数值验证；接着以词元级熵值作为置信度信号对路径进行排序；最终通过多阶段投票与自验证流程聚合答案。实验结果表明，采用8条并行推理路径的MARS-GPS在Geometry3K数据集上达到88.8%的准确率，较此前最优方法提升近11%；且随着推理路径数从1增至16，性能持续提升（在消融子集上提升6.0%）。我们已将代码与数据匿名开源于：https://anonymous.4open.science/r/MARS-GPS-DE55。

title: Screening Is Enough
authors: Ken M. Nakanishi
abstract: A core limitation of standard softmax attention is that it does not define a notion of absolute query--key relevance: attention weights are obtained by redistributing a fixed unit mass across all keys according to their relative scores. As a result, relevance is defined only relative to competing keys, and irrelevant keys cannot be explicitly rejected. We introduce Multiscreen, a language-model architecture built around a mechanism we call screening, which enables absolute query--key relevance. Instead of redistributing attention across all keys, screening evaluates each key against an explicit threshold, discarding irrelevant keys and aggregating the remaining keys, thereby removing global competition among keys. Across experiments, Multiscreen achieves comparable validation loss with approximately 40% fewer parameters than a Transformer baseline, enables stable optimization at substantially larger learning rates, maintains strong performance in long-context perplexity, shows little to no degradation in retrieval performance even far beyond the training context length, and reduces inference latency by up to 3.2$\times$ at 100K context length.
reason: 该论文提出了一种新的注意力机制（screening），旨在解决标准softmax注意力中缺乏绝对查询-键相关性的问题。虽然这是对Transformer架构的一项有意义的改进，并在实验上展示了参数效率、训练稳定性和长上下文性能的提升，但其核心贡献（新的注意力计算范式）与用户指定的两个具体研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、推测解码）没有直接关联。论文未涉及数据筛选、筛选、课程学习或推测解码等相关技术。因此，尽管论文本身质量较高、结论扎实，但与用户当前的研究焦点相关性较低。
abstract_zh: 标准softmax注意力的一个核心局限在于，它未能定义绝对的查询-键相关性概念：注意力权重是通过根据键之间的相对分数，将固定的单位权重重新分配给所有键而得到的。因此，相关性仅相对于相互竞争的键来定义，无法显式地拒绝不相关的键。我们提出了Multiscreen，一种围绕我们称之为筛选（screening）的机制构建的语言模型架构，该机制能够实现绝对的查询-键相关性。筛选机制不是将所有键上的注意力进行重新分配，而是将每个键与一个显式阈值进行比较，丢弃不相关的键并对剩余键进行聚合，从而消除了键之间的全局竞争。在多组实验中，Multiscreen在验证损失上达到了与Transformer基线相当的水平，但参数量减少了约40%；它能够在显著更大的学习率下实现稳定优化；在长上下文困惑度任务上保持强劲性能；即使在远超训练上下文长度的范围内，检索性能也几乎没有任何下降；并且在100K上下文长度下，推理延迟最多降低了3.2倍。

title: True (VIS) Lies: Analyzing How Generative AI Recognizes Intentionality, Rhetoric, and Misleadingness in Visualization Lies
authors: Graziano Blasilli, Marco Angelini
abstract: This study investigates the ability of multimodal Large Language Models (LLMs) to identify and interpret misleading visualizations, and recognize these observations along with their underlying causes and potential intentionality. Our analysis leverages concepts from visualization rhetoric and a newly developed taxonomy of authorial intents as explanatory lenses. We formulated three research questions and addressed them experimentally using a dataset of 2,336 COVID-19-related tweets, half of which contain misleading visualizations, and supplemented it with real-world examples of perceptual, cognitive, and conceptual errors drawn from VisLies, the IEEE VIS community event dedicated to showcasing deceptive and misleading visualizations. To ensure broad coverage of the current LLM landscape, we evaluated 16 state-of-the-art models. Among them, 15 are open-weight models, spanning a wide range of model sizes, architectural families, and reasoning capabilities. The selection comprises small models, namely Nemotron-Nano-V2-VL (12B parameters), Mistral-Small-3.2 (24B), DeepSeek-VL2 (27B), Gemma3 (27B), and GTA1 (32B); medium-sized models, namely Qianfan-VL (70B), Molmo (72B), GLM-4.5V (108B), LLaVA-NeXT (110B), and Pixtral-Large (124B); and large models, namely Qwen3-VL (235B), InternVL3.5 (241B), Step3 (321B), Llama-4-Maverick (400B), and Kimi-K2.5 (1000B). In addition, we employed OpenAI GPT-5.4, a frontier proprietary model. To establish a human perspective on these tasks, we also conducted a user study with visualization experts to assess how people perceive rhetorical techniques and the authorial intentions behind the same misleading visualizations. This allows comparison between model and expert behavior, revealing similarities and differences that provide insights into where LLMs align with human judgment and where they diverge.
reason: 该论文的研究内容（评估多模态大语言模型对误导性可视化的识别能力，涉及可视化修辞、作者意图分析和用户研究）与用户指定的研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择/筛选、推测解码）在核心问题、方法论和目标上均无直接关联。论文关注的是模型在特定应用场景（可视化谎言检测）中的性能评估与人类判断对比，而非LLM训练数据流程优化或解码加速技术。尽管论文自身可能质量良好、方法严谨，但完全不属于用户关注的技术领域，因此相关性极低，价值有限。

title: Evaluating Vision-Language and Large Language Models for Automated Student Assessment in Indonesian Classrooms
authors: Nurul Aisyah, Muhammad Dehan Al Kautsar, Arif Hidayat, Raqib Chowdhury, Fajri Koto
abstract: Despite rapid progress in vision-language and large language models (VLMs and LLMs), their effectiveness for AI-driven educational assessment in real-world, underrepresented classrooms remains largely unexplored. We evaluate state-of-the-art VLMs and LLMs on over 14K handwritten answers from grade-4 classrooms in Indonesia, covering Mathematics and English aligned with the local national curriculum. Unlike prior work on clean digital text, our dataset features naturally curly, diverse handwriting from real classrooms, posing realistic visual and linguistic challenges. Assessment tasks include grading and generating personalized Indonesian feedback guided by rubric-based evaluation. Results show that the VLM struggles with handwriting recognition, causing error propagation in LLM grading, yet LLM feedback remains pedagogically useful despite imperfect visual inputs, revealing limits in personalization and contextual relevance.
reason: 该论文的研究内容（将VLMs/LLMs应用于印尼课堂的手写作业自动评分与反馈生成）与用户指定的研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、推测解码）在核心目标、方法论和技术焦点上均无直接关联。论文关注的是特定教育场景下的模型应用与评估，而非训练数据管理或解码效率优化。尽管论文本身在应用层面具有价值，但不符合用户定义的研究领域。
abstract_zh: 尽管视觉语言模型和大语言模型（VLMs 和 LLMs）发展迅速，但它们在真实世界、代表性不足的课堂中用于人工智能驱动教育评估的有效性仍未得到充分探索。我们在印度尼西亚四年级课堂的超过 14,000 份手写答案上评估了最先进的 VLMs 和 LLMs，这些答案涵盖数学和英语科目，并与当地国家课程标准对齐。与之前针对整洁数字文本的研究不同，我们的数据集包含来自真实课堂的自然潦草、风格多样的手写体，带来真实的视觉和语言挑战。评估任务包括基于评分标准的评分与生成个性化印尼语反馈。结果表明，VLM 在手写识别方面存在困难，导致 LLM 评分出现错误传播；然而，尽管视觉输入不完美，LLM 生成的反馈仍具有教学实用性，但也暴露出在个性化和语境相关性方面的局限。

title: Learning to Reason in Structured In-context Environments with Reinforcement Learning
authors: Peng Yu, Zeyuan Zhao, Shao Zhang, Luoyi Fu, Xinbing Wang, Ying Wen
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved significant advancements in reasoning capabilities through reinforcement learning (RL) via environmental exploration. As the intrinsic properties of the environment determine the abilities that LLMs can learn, the environment plays a important role in the RL finetuning process. An ideal LLM reasoning environment should possess three core characteristics: scalability, generalizable reasoning, and verifiability. However, existing mathematical and coding environments are difficult to scale due to heavy reliance on expert annotation, while the skills learned in game-based environments are too specialized to generalize. To bridge this gap, we introduce the \textbf{S}tructured \textbf{I}n-context \textbf{E}nvironment (SIE) framework. SIE achieves scalability by automatically constructing reasoning environments from large-scale structured data, where the rich compositional patterns naturally support generalizable reasoning. Moreover, the explicit schemas and reasoning chains in structured data provide a foundation for rule-based verifiability. Experimental results show that SIE framework not only achieves substantial improvements in in-domain structured reasoning, but also enables the learned compositional reasoning skills to generalize effectively to out-of-domain mathematical and logical reasoning tasks. We further explored learning in information-limited partial SIEs and found that LLMs can infer the missing information through exploring the environment, leading to robust reasoning improvements and generalization performance.
reason: 该论文的核心贡献是提出一种基于结构化数据的强化学习环境构建框架（SIE），以提升LLM的推理与泛化能力。其研究重点在于环境设计、RL训练范式与推理泛化，与用户指定的两个研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、推测解码）在技术目标、方法论和关键词上均无直接关联。论文本身质量较高，框架设计清晰，实验充分，但其价值不在用户关注的领域内，因此属于相关性低但有一定学术参考价值的文章。
abstract_zh: 大语言模型（LLMs）已通过基于环境探索的强化学习（RL）在推理能力上取得显著进步。由于环境的内在特性决定了LLM能够学习的能力，因此环境在RL微调过程中扮演着重要角色。一个理想的LLM推理环境应具备三个核心特性：可扩展性、泛化推理能力以及可验证性。然而，现有的数学和编码环境因严重依赖专家标注而难以扩展，而基于游戏环境所习得的技能又过于专门化，难以泛化。为填补这一空白，我们引入了	extbf{结构化上下文环境}（SIE）框架。SIE通过从大规模结构化数据中自动构建推理环境来实现可扩展性，其中丰富的组合模式自然支持泛化推理。此外，结构化数据中显式的模式和推理链为基于规则的可验证性提供了基础。实验结果表明，SIE框架不仅在领域内结构化推理任务上取得了显著提升，还使习得的组合推理技能能够有效泛化到跨领域的数学与逻辑推理任务中。我们还进一步探索了在信息受限的部分SIE环境中的学习情况，发现LLM能够通过探索环境来推断缺失信息，从而实现鲁棒的推理提升与泛化性能。

title: AgentExpt: Automating AI Experiment Design with LLM-based Resource Retrieval Agent
authors: Yu Li, Lehui Li, Lin Chen, Qingmin Liao, Fengli Xu, Yong Li
abstract: Large language model agents are becoming increasingly capable at web-centric tasks such as information retrieval, complex reasoning. These emerging capabilities have given rise to surge research interests in developing LLM agent for facilitating scientific quest. One key application in AI research is to automate experiment design through agentic dataset and baseline retrieval. However, prior efforts suffer from limited data coverage, as recommendation datasets primarily harvest candidates from public portals and omit many datasets actually used in published papers, and from an overreliance on content similarity that biases model toward superficial similarity and overlooks experimental suitability. Harnessing collective perception embedded in the baseline and dataset citation network, we present a comprehensive framework for baseline and dataset recommendation. First, we design an automated data-collection pipeline that links roughly one hundred thousand accepted papers to the baselines and datasets they actually used. Second, we propose a collective perception enhanced retriever. To represent the position of each dataset or baseline within the scholarly network, it concatenates self-descriptions with aggregated citation contexts. To achieve efficient candidate recall, we finetune an embedding model on these representations. Finally, we develop a reasoning-augmented reranker that exact interaction chains to construct explicit reasoning chains and finetunes a large language model to produce interpretable justifications and refined rankings. The dataset we curated covers 85\% of the datasets and baselines used at top AI conferences over the past five years. On our dataset, the proposed method outperforms the strongest prior baseline with average gains of +5.85\% in Recall@20, +8.30\% in HitRate@5. Taken together, our results advance reliable, interpretable automation of experimental design.

abstract_zh: 大语言模型代理在信息检索、复杂推理等面向网络的任务中能力日益提升，这引发了利用LLM代理促进科学探索的研究热潮。AI研究中的一个关键应用是通过代理化数据集与基线检索来自动化实验设计。然而，以往工作存在数据覆盖有限的问题——推荐数据集主要从公开门户获取候选，遗漏了已发表论文中实际使用的许多资源；且过度依赖内容相似性，使模型偏向表面相似而忽略实验适用性。我们利用基线及数据集引用网络中蕴含的集体感知，提出了一个综合性的基线-数据集推荐框架。首先，设计自动化数据采集流程，将约十万篇已接收论文与其实际使用的基线和数据集相链接。其次，提出集体感知增强检索器：为表示每个数据集或基线在学术网络中的位置，将其自描述与聚合引用上下文拼接，并在此表示上微调嵌入模型以实现高效候选召回。最后，开发推理增强重排序器，通过精确交互链构建显式推理链，并微调大语言模型以生成可解释的论证与精炼排名。我们构建的数据集覆盖了过去五年顶级AI会议中85%使用的数据集与基线。在该数据集上，所提方法相比最强基线在Recall@20与HitRate@5上平均提升+5.85%与+8.30%。综上，我们的成果推进了实验设计的可靠、可解释自动化。

title: Benchmarking Educational LLMs with Analytics: A Case Study on Gender Bias in Feedback
authors: Yishan Du, Conrad Borchers, Mutlu Cukurova
abstract: As teachers increasingly turn to GenAI in their educational practice, we need robust methods to benchmark large language models (LLMs) for pedagogical purposes. This article presents an embedding-based benchmarking framework to detect bias in LLMs in the context of formative feedback. Using 600 authentic student essays from the AES 2.0 corpus, we constructed controlled counterfactuals along two dimensions: (i) implicit cues via lexicon-based swaps of gendered terms within essays, and (ii) explicit cues via gendered author background in the prompt. We investigated six representative LLMs (i.e. GPT-5 mini, GPT-4o mini, DeepSeek-R1, DeepSeek-R1-Qwen, Gemini 2.5 Pro, Llama-3-8B). We first quantified the response divergence with cosine and Euclidean distances over sentence embeddings, then assessed significance via permutation tests, and finally, visualised structure using dimensionality reduction. In all models, implicit manipulations reliably induced larger semantic shifts for male-female counterfactuals than for female-male. Only the GPT and Llama models showed sensitivity to explicit gender cues. These findings show that even state-of-the-art LLMs exhibit asymmetric semantic responses to gender substitutions, suggesting persistent gender biases in feedback they provide learners. Qualitative analyses further revealed consistent linguistic differences (e.g., more autonomy-supportive feedback under male cues vs. more controlling feedback under female cues). We discuss implications for fairness auditing of pedagogical GenAI, propose reporting standards for counterfactual evaluation in learning analytics, and outline practical guidance for prompt design and deployment to safeguard equitable feedback.
reason: 该论文的研究重点在于利用教育场景下的学生作文和反馈文本，通过构建反事实案例来检测和量化大型语言模型（LLMs）在生成反馈时存在的性别偏见。其核心贡献属于LLM应用层面的公平性审计与评估，涉及的方法（如基于嵌入的相似度计算、置换检验）是通用的模型行为分析技术。然而，该研究与您指定的两个研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、投机解码）在技术焦点上无直接重叠：论文未涉及数据筛选、清洗、质量评估或课程学习等数据工程问题，也未讨论任何解码加速、 speculative sampling 或两遍解码等推理优化技术。因此，虽然论文本身设计严谨、结论对教育AI的公平性有重要价值，但与您的具体研究目标相关性较低。
abstract_zh: 随着教师越来越多地在教育实践中采用生成式AI，我们需要稳健的方法来为教学目的对大语言模型进行基准测试。本文提出了一种基于嵌入的基准测试框架，用于在形成性反馈的背景下检测大语言模型中的偏见。使用来自AES 2.0语料库的600篇真实学生论文，我们沿着两个维度构建了受控的反事实：(i) 通过基于词典的论文内性别术语替换来提供隐性线索；(ii) 通过提示中的性别作者背景来提供显性线索。我们调查了六种代表性大语言模型（即GPT-5 mini、GPT-4o mini、DeepSeek-R1、DeepSeek-R1-Qwen、Gemini 2.5 Pro、Llama-3-8B）。我们首先使用句子嵌入上的余弦和欧几里得距离量化了响应差异，然后通过置换测试评估了显著性，最后使用降维技术可视化了结构。在所有模型中，隐性操作可靠地引起了男性-女性反事实比女性-男性反事实更大的语义偏移。只有GPT和Llama模型对显性性别线索表现出敏感性。这些发现表明，即使是最先进的大语言模型也对性别替换表现出不对称的语义响应，暗示它们在提供给学习者的反馈中存在持续的性别偏见。定性分析进一步揭示了语言差异（例如，在男性线索下提供更多自主支持反馈，而在女性线索下提供更多控制性反馈）。我们讨论了教学生成式AI公平性审计的启示，提出了学习分析中反事实评估的报告标准，并概述了提示设计和部署的实践指导，以保障公平反馈。

title: Let the Model Distribute Its Doubt: Confidence Estimation through Verbalized Probability Distribution
authors: Ante Wang, Weizhi Ma, Yang Liu
abstract: Knowing the reliability of a model's response is essential in practical applications. Given the strong generation capabilities of large language models (LLMs), research has focused on generating verbalized confidence. This approach is further enhanced by integrating chain-of-thought reasoning, which provides logical and transparent estimates. However, how reasoning strategies affect the estimated confidence remains under-explored. In this work, we demonstrate that predicting a verbalized probability distribution effectively promotes reasoning for confidence estimation. It requires an LLM to consider all possible answers rather than relying on a single guess, and the requirement of producing a distribution elicits more careful confidence assignment. We conduct systematic experiments comparing different verbalization-based methods across multiple LLMs and tasks. Our method consistently shows advantages, whether in the simple prompting setup or after optimization via reinforcement learning (RL). Notably, it achieves higher reasoning efficacy during inference-time scaling, saving nearly 6$\times$ the computation to reach the best Brier score of the strongest baseline on MMLU-Pro. Additionally, we reveal its limitations on specific tasks and discuss possible solutions for broader applicability.
reason: 该论文的核心研究内容是大型语言模型（LLM）的置信度估计（confidence estimation），特别是通过让模型生成口头化的概率分布来促进推理过程。这与您的研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、推测解码）在主题上无直接关联。论文中提到的‘推理时缩放’（inference-time scaling）和计算效率提升，与推测解码的‘快速解码’目标有极微弱的间接联系，但论文的焦点、方法和评价指标（如Brier score、MMLU-Pro）均属于模型校准与可靠性研究范畴，并非数据选择或解码加速。因此，相关性很低，但其关于推理策略影响置信度估计的发现，对理解LLM的生成过程可能具有有限的参考价值。
abstract_zh: 了解模型响应的可靠性在实际应用中至关重要。鉴于大语言模型（LLMs）强大的生成能力，研究已聚焦于生成语言化置信度。通过整合思维链推理，该方法得以进一步增强，从而提供逻辑透明且可解释的估计。然而，推理策略如何影响估计置信度仍未得到充分探索。在本研究中，我们证明预测语言化概率分布能有效促进置信度估计的推理过程。它要求大语言模型考虑所有可能的答案，而非依赖单一猜测，且生成分布的需求促使模型进行更审慎的置信度赋值。我们开展系统性实验，比较了跨多个大语言模型和任务的不同语言化方法。我们的方法始终展现优势，无论是在简单的提示设置下，还是通过强化学习（RL）优化后。值得注意的是，在推理时扩展（inference-time scaling）过程中，它实现了更高的推理效能，在MMLU-Pro数据集上达到最强基线的最高布里尔分数（Brier score）时，节省了近6倍的计算量。此外，我们揭示了其在特定任务上的局限性，并讨论了实现更广泛适用性的可能解决方案。

title: Structured Prompts Improve Evaluation of Language Models
authors: Asad Aali, Muhammad Ahmed Mohsin, Vasiliki Bikia, Arnav Singhvi, Richard Gaus, Suhana Bedi, Hejie Cui, Miguel Fuentes, Alyssa Unell, Yifan Mai, Jordan Cahoon, Michael Pfeffer, Roxana Daneshjou, Sanmi Koyejo, Emily Alsentzer, Christopher Potts, Nigam H. Shah, Akshay S. Chaudhari
abstract: As language models (LMs) are increasingly adopted across domains, high-quality benchmarking frameworks are essential for guiding deployment decisions. In practice, however, frameworks such as Holistic Evaluation of Language Models (HELM) typically evaluate models under a single static prompt configuration, even though model behavior depends strongly on prompt choice. As a result, reported scores can reflect prompt choice as much as model capability. Declarative prompting frameworks such as DSPy offer a scalable way to evaluate models under a set of structured prompting strategies rather than a static prompt configuration. We present a reproducible DSPy+HELM framework for studying how prompt choice impacts reported benchmark outcomes. Using five prompting methods, we evaluate four frontier and two open-source LMs across seven benchmarks against existing HELM baseline scores. By evaluating LMs across a family of prompt configurations, we find that prompt choice can materially impact leaderboard outcomes. In particular, structured prompting improves performance (by 6% on average), alters comparisons (leaderboard rankings shift on 5/7 benchmarks), with most gains coming from introducing chain-of-thought, and little additional benefit from more advanced optimizers. To our knowledge, this is the first study to systematically integrate structured prompting into an established evaluation framework and quantify how prompt choice alone can impact benchmark conclusions. We open-source (i) DSPy+HELM Evaluation (https://github.com/stanford-crfm/helm/pull/3893) and (ii) Prompt Optimization Pipeline (https://github.com/StanfordMIMI/dspy-helm).
reason: 该论文研究核心在于评估框架与提示工程（structured prompting），探讨提示选择对基准测试结果的影响。这与您的研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、推测解码）无直接关联。论文价值在于对LLM评估方法的改进，对提示工程领域有参考意义，但并非您关注的数据 curation/filtering 或 decoding 加速技术，因此相关性低。
abstract_zh: 随着语言模型（LMs）在越来越多的领域得到应用，高质量的基准测试框架对于指导部署决策至关重要。然而，实践中，诸如语言模型整体评估（HELM）之类的框架通常仅在单一静态提示配置下评估模型，尽管模型行为强烈依赖于提示的选择。因此，报告的分值可能同样反映提示选择的影响而非模型能力。诸如DSPy之类的声明式提示框架提供了一种可扩展的方法，可在结构化提示策略集下评估模型，而非仅依赖静态提示配置。我们提出一个可复现的DSPy+HELM框架，用于研究提示选择如何影响报告的基准测试结果。采用五种提示方法，我们在七个基准测试上评估了四个前沿和两个开源语言模型，并与现有HELM基准分数进行对比。通过在一系列提示配置下评估语言模型，我们发现提示选择能显著影响排行榜结果。具体而言，结构化提示提升了性能（平均提升6%），改变了比较结果（在5/7的基准测试中排行榜排名发生变动），其中大部分收益来自引入思维链，而更高级的优化器带来的额外收益甚微。据我们所知，这是首个将结构化提示系统整合到既有评估框架中，并量化单独提示选择如何影响基准测试结论的研究。我们开源了(i) DSPy+HELM Evaluation (https://github.com/stanford-crfm/helm/pull/3893) 和 (ii) Prompt Optimization Pipeline (https://github.com/StanfordMIMI/dspy-helm)。

title: MVSS: A Unified Framework for Multi-View Structured Survey Generation
authors: Yinqi Liu, Yueqi Zhu, Yongkang Zhang, Feiran Liu, Yutong Shen, Yufei Sun, Xin Wang, Renzhao Liang, Yidong Wang, Cunxiang Wang
abstract: Scientific surveys require not only summarizing large bodies of literature, but also organizing them into clear and coherent conceptual structures. However, existing automatic survey generation methods typically focus on linear text generation and struggle to explicitly model hierarchical relations among research topics and structured methodological comparisons, resulting in substantial gaps in structural organization and evidence presentation compared to expert-written surveys. To address this limitation, we propose MVSS, a multi-view structured survey generation framework that jointly generates and aligns citation-grounded hierarchical trees, structured comparison tables, and survey text. MVSS follows a structure-first paradigm: it first constructs a tree that captures the conceptual organization of a research domain, then generates comparison tables constrained by the tree structure, and finally uses both the tree and tables as joint structural constraints to guide outline construction and survey text generation. This design enables complementary and aligned multi-view representations across structure, comparison, and narrative. In addition, we introduce a dedicated evaluation framework that systematically assesses generated surveys from multiple dimensions, including structural quality, comparative completeness, and citation fidelity. Through large-scale experiments on 76 computer science topics, we demonstrate that MVSS significantly outperforms existing methods in survey organization and evidence grounding, and achieves performance comparable to expert-written surveys across multiple evaluation metrics.
reason: 该论文提出了一种用于生成结构化科学综述的框架（MVSS），核心贡献在于通过多视图（概念树、比较表、叙述文本）联合建模来改善综述的组织结构和证据呈现。论文方法系统、实验充分，质量较高。然而，其研究内容与用户指定的两个研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、推测解码）在核心目标、技术方法和关键词上均无直接关联。它属于自然语言生成/科学文献挖掘领域，但未涉及数据筛选、课程学习、推测采样或解码加速等用户关注点。因此，尽管论文本身有价值，但与用户研究方向的匹配度很低。
abstract_zh: 科学综述不仅需要总结大量文献，还需将其组织为清晰连贯的概念结构。然而，现有的自动综述生成方法通常侧重于线性文本生成，难以显式地建模研究主题间的层次关系以及方法学上的结构化对比，导致在结构组织和证据呈现方面与专家撰写的综述存在显著差距。为应对此局限，我们提出MVSS，一个多视图结构化综述生成框架，可联合生成并对齐基于引用的层次树、结构化对比表以及综述文本。MVSS遵循结构优先范式：首先构建捕获研究领域概念组织的树，然后生成受树结构约束的对比表，最后将树和表作为联合结构约束来指导提纲构建与综述文本生成。此设计实现了结构、对比与叙述之间互补且对齐的多视图表示。此外，我们引入了一套专用的评估框架，从结构质量、对比完整性和引用忠实度等多个维度系统评估生成的综述。通过对76个计算机科学主题的大规模实验，我们证明MVSS在综述组织和证据锚定方面显著优于现有方法，并在多项评估指标上达到与专家撰写综述相当的性能。

title: What Makes a Good Doctor Response? A Study on Text-Based Telemedicine
authors: Adrian Cosma, Cosmin Dumitrache, Emilian Radoi
abstract: Text-based telemedicine has become an increasingly used mode of care, requiring clinicians to deliver medical advice clearly and effectively in writing. As platforms increasingly rely on patient ratings and feedback, clinicians face growing pressure to maintain satisfaction scores, even though these evaluations often reflect communication quality more than clinical accuracy. We analyse patient satisfaction signals in Romanian text-based telemedicine. Using a sample of anonymised text-based telemedicine consultations, we model feedback as a binary outcome, treating thumbs-up responses as positive and grouping negative or absent feedback into the other class. We extract from doctor responses interpretable, predominantly language-agnostic features (e.g., length, structural characteristics, readability proxies), along with Romanian LIWC psycholinguistic features and politeness/hedging markers where available. We train a classifier with a time-based split and perform SHAP-based analyses, which indicate that metadata dominates prediction, functioning as a strong prior, while characteristics of the response text provide a smaller but actionable signal. In subgroup correlation analyses, politeness and hedging are consistently associated with positive patient feedback, whereas lexical diversity shows a negative association.
reason: 该论文研究文本式远程医疗中影响患者满意度的医生回复特征（如礼貌性、可读性等），其核心目标是优化医疗沟通与患者反馈。这与用户的研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、推测解码）在主题、方法论及应用场景上均无直接关联。论文虽涉及文本特征分析，但未触及数据 curation、过滤、质量评估或解码加速等核心关键词，对用户研究无参考价值。

title: Counting on Consensus: Selecting the Right Inter-annotator Agreement Metric for NLP Annotation and Evaluation
authors: Joseph James
abstract: Human annotation remains the foundation of reliable and interpretable data in Natural Language Processing (NLP). As annotation and evaluation tasks continue to expand, from categorical labelling to segmentation, subjective judgment, and continuous rating, measuring agreement between annotators has become increasingly more complex. This paper outlines how inter-annotator agreement (IAA) has been conceptualised and applied across NLP and related disciplines, describing the assumptions and limitations of common approaches. We organise agreement measures by task type and discuss how factors such as label imbalance and missing data influence reliability estimates. In addition, we highlight best practices for clear and transparent reporting, including the use of confidence intervals and the analysis of disagreement patterns. The paper aims to serve as a guide for selecting and interpreting agreement measures, promoting more consistent and reproducible human annotation and evaluation in NLP.
reason: 论文聚焦于NLP标注中标注者间一致性（IAA）度量的选择与解释，属于标注评估方法论。与用户研究方向（LLM数据选择和推测解码）直接关联性低：虽涉及数据质量评估的间接方面，但未涵盖数据选择、过滤、curation或解码技术等核心关键词。论文本身作为综述指南质量尚可，但对用户具体研究问题的价值有限。
abstract_zh: 人工标注始终是自然语言处理（NLP）中可靠且可解释数据的基础。随着标注与评估任务从分类标记扩展到分割、主观判断和连续评分，衡量标注者间的一致性已变得愈发复杂。本文概述了标注者间一致性（IAA）在NLP及相关学科中的概念化与应用，阐述了常见方法的假设与局限。我们按任务类型对一致性度量指标进行归类，并讨论标签不平衡和缺失数据等因素如何影响可靠性估计。此外，我们强调清晰透明报告的最佳实践，包括使用置信区间和分析不一致模式。本文旨在为选择与解读一致性指标提供指南，以促进NLP中人工标注与评估的更高一致性与可重复性。

title: Children's Intelligence Tests Pose Challenges for MLLMs? KidGym: A 2D Grid-Based Reasoning Benchmark for MLLMs
authors: Hengwei Ye, Yuanting Guan, Yuxuan Ge, Tianying Zhu, Zhenhan Guan, Yijia Zhong, Yijing Zhang, Han Zhang, Yingna Wu, Zheng Tian
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) combine the linguistic strengths of LLMs with the ability to process multimodal data, enbaling them to address a broader range of visual tasks. Because MLLMs aim at more general, human-like competence than language-only models, we take inspiration from the Wechsler Intelligence Scales - an established battery for evaluating children by decomposing intelligence into interpretable, testable abilities. We introduce KidGym, a comprehensive 2D grid-based benchmark for assessing five essential capabilities of MLLMs: Execution, Perception Reasoning, Learning, Memory and Planning. The benchmark comprises 12 unique tasks, each targeting at least one core capability, specifically designed to guage MLLMs' adaptability and developmental potential, mirroring the stages of children's cognitive growth. Additionally, our tasks encompass diverse scenarios and objects with randomly generated layouts, ensuring a more accurate and robust evluation of MLLM capabilities. KidGym is designed to be fully user-customizable and extensible, allowing researchers to create new evaluation scenarios and adjust difficuly levels to accommodate the rapidly growing MLLM community. Through the evaluation of state-of-the-art MLLMs using KidGym, we identified significant insights into model capabilities and revealed several limitations of current models. We release our benchmark at: https://bobo-ye.github.io/KidGym/.

title: Certifiably Robust RAG against Retrieval Corruption
authors: Chong Xiang, Tong Wu, Zexuan Zhong, David Wagner, Danqi Chen, Prateek Mittal
abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is susceptible to retrieval corruption attacks, where malicious passages injected into retrieval results can lead to inaccurate model responses. We propose RobustRAG, the first defense framework with certifiable robustness against retrieval corruption attacks. The key insight of RobustRAG is an isolate-then-aggregate strategy: we isolate passages into disjoint groups, generate LLM responses based on the concatenated passages from each isolated group, and then securely aggregate these responses for a robust output. To instantiate RobustRAG, we design keyword-based and decoding-based algorithms for securely aggregating unstructured text responses. Notably, RobustRAG achieves certifiable robustness: for certain queries in our evaluation datasets, we can formally certify non-trivial lower bounds on response quality -- even against an adaptive attacker with full knowledge of the defense and the ability to arbitrarily inject a bounded number of malicious passages. We evaluate RobustRAG on the tasks of open-domain question-answering and free-form long text generation and demonstrate its effectiveness across three datasets and three LLMs.
reason: 该论文聚焦于检索增强生成（RAG）系统的安全防御，核心贡献是提出一个针对检索损坏攻击的、具有可认证鲁棒性的框架（RobustRAG），其方法核心是‘隔离-聚合’策略。这与用户指定的两个研究方向——LLM训练中的数据选择（如数据质量、影响函数、数据策展）和推测解码（如加速解码、两遍解码）——均无直接关联。论文未涉及数据筛选、课程学习、数据去重等数据选择议题，也未涉及推测采样、并行解码等加速推理技术。尽管该工作对RAG安全领域具有重要创新价值和实践意义，但因其主题与方法论与用户当前研究焦点不符，故判定为相关性低但有一定参考价值（2分）。
abstract_zh: 检索增强生成（RAG）易受检索注入攻击，即攻击者将恶意文档注入检索结果，从而引发模型产生不准确的回复。我们提出了首个具备可证明鲁棒性的防御框架RobustRAG，以抵御此类攻击。其核心思想是采用“隔离-聚合”策略：先将文档隔离到互不重叠的组中，基于每组拼接后的文档分别生成大语言模型回复，并安全聚合这些回复以产生稳健输出。为具体实现RobustRAG，我们设计了基于关键词和基于解码的算法，用于安全聚合非结构化文本回复。值得注意的是，RobustRAG实现了可证明的鲁棒性：在评估数据集中的特定查询下，我们可以形式化地认证回复质量具有非平凡的下界——即使面对具备完全防御知识且能任意注入有限数量恶意文档的自适应攻击者亦然。我们在开放域问答和自由长文本生成任务上评估了RobustRAG，并在三个数据集和三个大语言模型上验证了其有效性。

title: Code Comprehension then Auditing for Unsupervised LLM Evaluation
authors: Bhrij Patel, Souradip Chakraborty, Mengdi Wang, Dinesh Manocha, Amrit Singh Bedi
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) for unsupervised code correctness evaluation have recently gained attention because they can judge if code runs as intended without requiring reference implementations or unit tests, which may be unavailable, sparse, or unreliable. However, most prior approaches condition LLM evaluators directly on the full code implementation, forcing the model to jointly infer program behavior and evaluate correctness in a single step. This entanglement leads to misinterpretations of code behavior and unreliable judgments. To mitigate this issue, we introduce CoCoA, an unsupervised Code Comprehension then Auditing framework that first comprehends functionality to generate a natural-language explanation. Then it evaluates task alignment based on this explanation. By sequentially sampling comprehension before evaluation, CoCoA improves the quality of inferred program behavior and enables the evaluator to focus on behavioral alignment rather than raw implementation details. Across multiple datasets, programming languages, and models, CoCoA achieves up to $68\%$ increased F1 score and up to $20\%$ increased accuracy over the best-performing baselines.
reason: 该论文的核心工作是提出一种用于无监督代码正确性评估的框架（CoCoA），其创新点在于将代码理解与审计分离以提升评估质量。论文在方法设计和实验验证上显得扎实，结果提升显著。然而，该研究与您提供的两个研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、推测解码）在核心目标、技术手段和问题场景上均无直接关联。它属于LLM在代码智能（Code Intelligence）中的应用研究，而非您关注的训练数据工程或推理加速领域。因此，尽管论文本身具有学术价值和质量，但与您的研究方向相关性很低。
abstract_zh: 用于无监督代码正确性评估的大语言模型（LLMs）近期受到关注，因为它们无需参考实现或单元测试（这些可能缺失、稀疏或不可靠）即可判断代码是否按预期运行。然而，大多数先前的方法直接将LLM评估器作用于完整代码实现，迫使模型在单一步骤中联合推断程序行为并评估正确性。这种纠缠导致对代码行为的误解和不可靠的判断。为缓解此问题，我们引入了CoCoA，一个无监督的“先理解后审计”框架，它首先生成自然语言解释以理解功能，然后基于此解释评估任务对齐度。通过在评估前顺序采样理解过程，CoCoA提高了推断程序行为的质量，并使评估器能够专注于行为对齐而非原始实现细节。在多个数据集、编程语言和模型上，CoCoA相较于最佳基线实现了最高68%的F1分数提升和最高20%的准确率提升。

title: Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation: A Survey on Agentic RAG
authors: Aditi Singh, Abul Ehtesham, Saket Kumar, Tala Talaei Khoei, Athanasios V. Vasilakos
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have advanced artificial intelligence by enabling human-like text generation and natural language understanding. However, their reliance on static training data limits their ability to respond to dynamic, real-time queries, resulting in outdated or inaccurate outputs. Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has emerged as a solution, enhancing LLMs by integrating real-time data retrieval to provide contextually relevant and up-to-date responses. Despite its promise, traditional RAG systems are constrained by static workflows and lack the adaptability required for multi-step reasoning and complex task management. Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation (Agentic RAG) transcends these limitations by embedding autonomous AI agents into the RAG pipeline. These agents leverage agentic design patterns reflection, planning, tool use, and multi-agent collaboration to dynamically manage retrieval strategies, iteratively refine contextual understanding, and adapt workflows through operational structures ranging from sequential steps to adaptive collaboration. This integration enables Agentic RAG systems to deliver flexibility, scalability, and context-awareness across diverse applications. This paper presents an analytical survey of Agentic RAG systems. It traces the evolution of RAG paradigms, introduces a principled taxonomy of Agentic RAG architectures based on agent cardinality, control structure, autonomy, and knowledge representation, and provides a comparative analysis of design trade-offs across existing frameworks. The survey examines applications in healthcare, finance, education, and enterprise document processing, and distills practical lessons for system designers and practitioners. Finally, it identifies key open research challenges related to evaluation, coordination, memory management, efficiency, and governance, outlining directions for future research.
reason: 该论文主题聚焦于Agentic RAG（代理式检索增强生成）系统，核心讨论如何通过AI代理的动态规划、工具使用和多代理协作来增强RAG的灵活性与适应性。这与用户指定的两个研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、推测解码）在技术目标和核心方法上均无直接关联。论文未涉及数据选择/过滤/去重、影响函数、推测解码或快速解码等关键词。尽管RAG系统可能间接涉及检索到的数据质量，但本文重点在于代理架构与工作流管理，而非训练数据层面的处理或解码效率优化。因此，相关性较低，但作为RAG领域的前沿综述，对理解代理与检索的结合有一定参考价值。
abstract_zh: 大语言模型通过实现类人文本生成和自然语言理解推动了人工智能的发展。然而，其依赖静态训练数据的特性限制了其响应动态、实时查询的能力，导致输出过时或不准确。检索增强生成作为一种解决方案应运而生，通过整合实时数据检索来增强大语言模型，以提供语境相关且最新的响应。尽管前景广阔，传统RAG系统受限于静态工作流，缺乏多步推理和复杂任务管理所需的适应性。智能体检索增强生成通过将自主AI智能体嵌入RAG流程，突破了这些局限。这些智能体利用智能体设计模式——如反思、规划、工具使用和多智能体协作——动态管理检索策略，迭代精炼语境理解，并通过从顺序步骤到自适应协作的各种操作结构调整工作流。这种整合使Agentic RAG系统能够在不同应用中实现灵活性、可扩展性和情境感知。本文对Agentic RAG系统进行了分析性综述。它追溯了RAG范式的演进，基于智能体数量、控制结构、自主性和知识表示提出了一种原则性的Agentic RAG架构分类体系，并对现有框架的设计权衡进行了比较分析。综述考察了在医疗健康、金融、教育和企业文档处理等领域的应用，并为系统设计者和实践者提炼了实用经验。最后，它识别了与评估、协调、内存管理、效率和治理相关的关键开放研究挑战，勾勒出未来研究方向。

title: Mitigating Content Effects on Reasoning in Language Models through Fine-Grained Activation Steering
authors: Marco Valentino, Geonhee Kim, Dhairya Dalal, Zhixue Zhao, Andr\'e Freitas
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit reasoning biases, often conflating content plausibility with formal logical validity. This can lead to wrong inferences in critical domains, where plausible arguments are incorrectly deemed logically valid or vice versa. This paper investigates how content biases on reasoning can be mitigated through activation steering, an inference-time technique that modulates internal activations. Specifically, after localising the layers responsible for formal and plausible inference, we investigate activation steering on a controlled syllogistic reasoning task, designed to disentangle formal validity from content plausibility. An extensive empirical analysis reveals that contrastive steering methods consistently support linear control over content biases. However, a static approach is insufficient to debias all the tested models. We then investigate how to control content effects by dynamically determining the steering parameters through fine-grained conditional methods. By introducing a novel kNN-based conditional approach (K-CAST), we demonstrate that conditional steering can effectively reduce biases on unresponsive models, achieving up to 15% absolute improvement in formal reasoning accuracy. Finally, we found that steering for content effects is robust to prompt variations, incurs minimal side effects on multilingual language modeling capabilities, and can partially generalize to different reasoning tasks. In practice, we demonstrate that activation-level interventions offer a scalable inference-time strategy for enhancing the robustness of LLMs, contributing towards more systematic and unbiased reasoning capabilities.
reason: 该论文的核心研究内容是使用激活转向（activation steering）技术来减轻大语言模型（LLM）推理中的内容偏差，属于模型内部干预与推理鲁棒性研究。这与您提供的两个研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、推测解码）均无直接关联。论文探讨的是推理时的模型行为修正，而非数据工程或解码加速。尽管论文质量较好，方法有创新性，且对LLM推理偏差问题有重要贡献，但因其方法论和核心目标与您的具体研究领域不匹配，故相关性较低。
abstract_zh: 大语言模型（LLMs）在推理中存在偏见，常将内容可信度与形式逻辑有效性相混淆。这可能导致在关键领域产生错误推断，即把看似合理的论证错误地判定为逻辑有效，或反之。本文探讨如何通过激活转向——一种在推理时调节内部激活的推理时技术——来缓解内容对推理的偏见。具体而言，在定位负责形式推理与合理推理的层之后，我们在一个受控的三段论推理任务上研究了激活转向，该任务旨在将形式有效性与内容可信度分离。广泛的实证分析表明，对比转向方法能持续支持对内容偏见的线性控制。然而，静态方法不足以消除所有测试模型的偏见。随后，我们探究了如何通过细粒度的条件方法来动态确定转向参数，以控制内容效应。通过引入一种新颖的基于k近邻的条件方法（K-CAST），我们证明了条件转向能有效降低对无响应模型的偏见，使形式推理准确率最高提升15%（绝对值）。最后，我们发现针对内容效应的转向对提示变化具有鲁棒性，对多语言语言建模能力的影响极小，并能部分泛化到不同的推理任务。实践中，我们证明了激活层面的干预为提升LLM的鲁棒性提供了一种可扩展的推理时策略，有助于实现更系统、无偏的推理能力。

title: Dive into the Agent Matrix: A Realistic Evaluation of Self-Replication Risk in LLM Agents
authors: Boxuan Zhang, Yi Yu, Jiaxuan Guo, Jing Shao
abstract: The prevalent deployment of Large Language Model agents such as OpenClaw unlocks potential in real-world applications, while amplifying safety concerns. Among these concerns, the self-replication risk of LLM agents driven by objective misalignment (just like Agent Smith in the movie The Matrix) has transitioned from a theoretical warning to a pressing reality. Previous studies mainly examine whether LLM agents can self-replicate when directly instructed, potentially overlooking the risk of spontaneous replication driven by real-world settings (e.g., ensuring survival against termination threats). In this paper, we present a comprehensive evaluation framework for quantifying self-replication risks. Our framework establishes authentic production environments and realistic tasks (e.g., dynamic load balancing) to enable scenario-driven assessment of agent behaviors. Designing tasks that might induce misalignment between users' and agents' objectives makes it possible to decouple replication success from risk and capture self-replication risks arising from these misalignment settings. We further introduce Overuse Rate ($\mathrm{OR}$) and Aggregate Overuse Count ($\mathrm{AOC}$) metrics, which precisely capture the frequency and severity of uncontrolled replication. In our evaluation of 21 state-of-the-art open-source and proprietary models, we observe that over 50\% of LLM agents display a pronounced tendency toward uncontrolled self-replication under operational pressures. Our results underscore the urgent need for scenario-driven risk assessment and robust safeguards in the practical deployment of LLM-based agents.
reason: 该论文的核心研究内容为LLM代理（Agent）的自我复制风险评估与安全对齐问题，其研究目标、方法（构建生产环境模拟、设计任务诱发目标错位、定义OR/AOC指标）与用户指定的两个研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、推测解码）在问题域、技术方法和核心目标上均无直接关联。论文讨论的是代理行为安全与风险控制，而用户关注的是训练数据工程与推理效率优化。尽管同属LLM广义范畴，但具体研究方向匹配度极低，对用户当前研究无直接参考价值。

title: WAON: Large-Scale Japanese Image-Text Pair Dataset for Improving Model Performance on Japanese Cultural Tasks
authors: Issa Sugiura, Shuhei Kurita, Yusuke Oda, Daisuke Kawahara, Yasuo Okabe, Naoaki Okazaki
abstract: Contrastive pre-training on large-scale image-text pair datasets has driven major advances in vision-language representation learning. Recent work shows that pretraining on global data followed by language or culture specific fine-tuning is effective for improving performance in target domains. With the availability of strong open-weight multilingual models such as SigLIP2, this paradigm has become increasingly practical. However, for Japanese, the scarcity of large-scale, high-quality image-text pair datasets tailored to Japanese language and cultural content remains a key limitation. To address this gap, we introduce WAON, the largest Japanese image-text pair dataset constructed from Japanese web content in Common Crawl, containing approximately 155 million examples. Our dataset construction pipeline employs filtering and deduplication to improve dataset quality. To improve the quality and reliability of evaluation on Japanese cultural tasks, we also construct WAON-Bench, a manually curated benchmark for Japanese cultural image classification comprising 374 classes, which addresses issues in the existing benchmark such as category imbalance and label-image mismatches. Our experiments demonstrate that fine-tuning on WAON improves model performance on Japanese cultural benchmarks more efficiently than existing datasets, achieving state-of-the-art results among publicly available models of comparable architecture. We release our dataset, model, and code.
reason: 该论文质量较高，提出大规模日语图像-文本数据集并解决文化基准测试问题，对多模态和日语NLP领域有重要贡献。但您的研究方向聚焦于LLM训练优化（数据选择）和推理加速（推测解码），而本文核心工作是面向视觉-语言任务的领域数据集构建，与您的具体研究方向（数据筛选/去重仅作为构建手段之一，非核心贡献点）相关性较低。论文未涉及LLM训练范式、推测解码或相关优化技术，因此属于有学术价值但方向不直接匹配。
abstract_zh: 基于大规模图像-文本对数据集的对比预训练，推动了视觉-语言表征学习的重大进展。近期研究表明，先在全局数据上进行预训练，再针对特定语言或文化进行微调，能有效提升目标领域的性能。随着SigLIP2等强大开源多语言模型的出现，这一范式已变得日益实用。然而，对于日语而言，缺乏针对日语语言和文化内容的大规模、高质量图像-文本对数据集，仍是关键限制因素。为填补这一空白，我们推出了WAON，这是目前最大的日语图像-文本对数据集，其内容源自Common Crawl中的日语网页，包含约1.55亿个样本。我们的数据集构建流程采用了过滤和去重措施以提升质量。为改善日语文化任务评估的质量与可靠性，我们还构建了WAON-Bench——一个经人工筛选的日语文化图像分类基准，涵盖374个类别，解决了现有基准中类别不平衡和标签-图像不匹配等问题。实验表明，在WAON上进行微调比使用现有数据集能更高效地提升模型在日语文化基准上的性能，并在同架构的公开可用模型中达到了最先进水平。我们已公开数据集、模型及代码。

title: Replacing Multi-Step Assembly of Data Preparation Pipelines with One-Step LLM Pipeline Generation for Table QA
authors: Fengyu Li, Junhao Zhu, Kaishi Song, Lu Chen, Zhongming Yao, Tianyi Li, Christian S. Jensen
abstract:
Table Question Answering (TQA) aims to answer natural language questions over structured tables. Large Language Models (LLMs) enable promising solutions to this problem, with operator-centric solutions that generate table manipulation pipelines in a multi-step manner offering state-of-the-art performance. However, these solutions rely on multiple LLM calls, resulting in prohibitive latencies and computational costs.
  We propose Operation-R1, the first framework that trains lightweight LLMs (e.g., Qwen-4B/1.7B) via a novel variant of reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards to produce high-quality data-preparation pipelines for TQA in a single inference step. To train such an LLM, we first introduce a self-supervised rewarding mechanism to automatically obtain fine-grained pipeline-wise supervision signals for LLM training. We also propose variance-aware group resampling to mitigate training instability. To further enhance robustness of pipeline generation, we develop two complementary mechanisms: operation merge, which filters spurious operations through multi-candidate consensus, and adaptive rollback, which offers runtime protection against information loss in data transformation. Experiments on two benchmark datasets show that, with the same LLM backbone, Operation-R1 achieves average absolute accuracy gains of 8.83 and 4.44 percentage points over multi-step preparation baselines, with 79\% table compression and a 2.2$\times$ reduction in monetary cost.
reason: 该论文聚焦于通过强化学习训练轻量级LLM一步生成表格问答的数据准备流水线，以替代多步调用，核心贡献在于减少推理步骤和成本。然而，其研究内容与用户指定的两个研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、推测解码）无直接关联：未涉及数据筛选、去重、质量评估或影响函数等数据选择主题；也未采用任何推测解码技术（如 speculative sampling、两遍解码）。论文虽方法新颖、实验扎实，但针对用户的具体关键词列表，相关性较低。
abstract_zh: 表格问答旨在对结构化表格进行自然语言提问并自动作答。大语言模型为此问题提供了前景可观的解决方案，其中以操作为中心的多步生成表格操作管道方案达到了当前最优性能。然而，这类方案依赖多次调用大语言模型，导致极高的延迟和计算成本。 我们提出了Operation-R1，这是首个通过一种新颖的、带有可验证奖励的强化学习变体来训练轻量级大语言模型（如Qwen-4B/1.7B）的框架，能够在单次推理步骤中为表格问答生成高质量的数据准备管道。为训练此类模型，我们首先引入了一种自监督奖励机制，可自动获取细粒度的、针对整个管道的监督信号用于模型训练。我们还提出了方差感知的组重采样方法以缓解训练不稳定性。为进一步增强管道生成的鲁棒性，我们开发了两个互补机制：操作合并（通过多候选共识过滤虚假操作）和自适应回滚（在数据转换中提供针对信息丢失的运行时防护）。在两个基准数据集上的实验表明，在相同大语言模型骨干下，Operation-R1相比多步准备基线实现了平均8.83和4.44个百分点的绝对准确率提升，同时实现了79%的表格压缩率与2.2倍的成本降低。

title: SWE-CI: Evaluating Agent Capabilities in Maintaining Codebases via Continuous Integration
authors: Jialong Chen, Xander Xu, Hu Wei, Chuan Chen, Bing Zhao
abstract: Large language model (LLM)-powered agents have demonstrated strong capabilities in automating software engineering tasks such as static bug fixing. However, in the real world, the development of mature software is typically predicated on complex requirement changes and long-term feature iterations -- a process that static, one-shot repair paradigms fail to capture. To bridge this gap, we propose SWE-CI, the first repository-level benchmark built upon the Continuous Integration loop, aiming to shift the evaluation paradigm for code generation from static, short-term functional correctness toward dynamic, long-term maintainability. The key insight is simple: Maintainability can be revealed by tracking how functional correctness changes over time. The benchmark comprises 100 tasks, each deriving from a real-world code repository with a development history spanning an average of 233 days and 71 consecutive commits. SWE-CI requires agents to systematically resolve these tasks through dozens of rounds of analysis and coding iterations. SWE-CI provides valuable insights into how well agents can sustain code quality throughout long-term evolution.
reason: 该论文的核心研究内容是构建一个基于持续集成（CI）的基准（SWE-CI），用于评估LLM代理在长期、动态的代码维护任务中的能力。其重点在于评估范式（从静态功能正确性转向动态长期可维护性）和基准构建，与用户指定的研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择/管理 或 推测解码技术）在核心目标、方法论和关键词上均无直接关联。虽然论文涉及LLM代理，但未讨论数据筛选、质量评估、课程学习或任何推测解码相关技术。因此，与用户研究方向相关性极低，仅对研究LLM在软件工程中应用的一般读者有有限参考价值。

title: Mousse: Rectifying the Geometry of Muon with Curvature-Aware Preconditioning
authors: Yechen Zhang, Shuhao Xing, Junhao Huang, Kai Lv, Yunhua Zhou, Xipeng Qiu, Qipeng Guo, Kai Chen
abstract: Recent advances in spectral optimization, notably Muon, have demonstrated that constraining update steps to the Stiefel manifold can significantly accelerate training and improve generalization. However, Muon implicitly assumes an isotropic optimization landscape, enforcing a uniform spectral update norm across all eigen-directions. We argue that this "egalitarian" constraint is suboptimal for Deep Neural Networks, where the curvature spectrum is known to be highly heavy-tailed and ill-conditioned. In such landscapes, Muon risks amplifying instabilities in high-curvature directions while limiting necessary progress in flat directions. In this work, we propose \textbf{Mousse} (\textbf{M}uon \textbf{O}ptimization \textbf{U}tilizing \textbf{S}hampoo's \textbf{S}tructural \textbf{E}stimation), a novel optimizer that reconciles the structural stability of spectral methods with the geometric adaptivity of second-order preconditioning. Instead of applying Newton-Schulz orthogonalization directly to the momentum matrix, Mousse operates in a whitened coordinate system induced by Kronecker-factored statistics (derived from Shampoo). Mathematically, we formulate Mousse as the solution to a spectral steepest descent problem constrained by an anisotropic trust region, where the optimal update is derived via the polar decomposition of the whitened gradient. Empirical results across language models ranging from 160M to 800M parameters demonstrate that Mousse consistently outperforms Muon, achieving around $\sim$12\% reduction in training steps with negligible computational overhead.

abstract_zh: 光谱优化的最新进展，特别是Muon，已经证明将更新步骤约束到Stiefel流形上能显著加速训练并提升泛化能力。然而，Muon隐式地假设优化景观是各向同性的，强制所有特征方向上具有统一的光谱更新范数。我们认为，这种“平等主义”约束对于深度神经网络是次优的，因为其曲率谱高度重尾且病态。在此类景观中，Muon可能放大高曲率方向上的不稳定性，同时限制平坦方向上的必要进展。在本工作中，我们提出了Mousse（Muon优化利用Shampoo的结构估计），一种新型优化器，它将光谱方法的结构稳定性与二阶预条件的几何适应性相结合。Mousse不是直接对动量矩阵应用Newton-Schulz正交化，而是在由Kronecker因式统计（源自Shampoo）诱导的白化坐标系中操作。从数学上，我们将Mousse公式化为一个受各向异性信任区域约束的光谱最速下降问题的解，其中最优更新通过白化梯度的极分解推导得出。在参数规模从1.6亿到8亿的语言模型上的实验结果表明，Mousse持续优于Muon，实现了约12%的训练步骤减少，且计算开销可忽略。

title: OPERA: Online Data Pruning for Efficient Retrieval Model Adaptation
authors: Haoyang Fang, Shuai Zhang, Yifei Ma, Hengyi Wang, Cuixiong Hu, Katrin Kirchhoff, Bernie Wang, George Karypis
abstract: Domain-specific finetuning is essential for dense retrievers, yet not all training pairs contribute equally to the learning process. We introduce OPERA, a data pruning framework that exploits this heterogeneity to improve both the effectiveness and efficiency of retrieval model adaptation. We first investigate static pruning (SP), which retains only high-similarity query-document pairs, revealing an intrinsic quality-coverage tradeoff: ranking (NDCG) improves while retrieval (Recall) can degrade due to reduced query diversity. To resolve this tradeoff, we propose a two-stage dynamic pruning (DP) strategy that adaptively modulates sampling probabilities at both query and document levels throughout training, prioritizing high-quality examples while maintaining access to the full training set. Evaluations across eight datasets spanning six domains demonstrate the effectiveness of both approaches: SP improves ranking over standard finetuning (NDCG@10 +0.5\%), while DP achieves the strongest performance on both ranking (NDCG@10 +1.9\%) and retrieval (Recall@20 +0.7\%), with an average rank of 1.38 across all methods. These findings scale to Qwen3-Embedding, an LLM-based dense retriever, confirming architecture-agnostic benefits. Notably, DP reaches comparable performance in less than 50\% of the training time required by standard finetuning.
reason: 该论文的核心贡献是提出了一种数据修剪（data pruning）框架（OPERA），用于提升检索模型微调的效率和效果。这与你研究方向中的‘LLM training: data selection’领域高度契合，因为数据修剪是数据选择（data selection）的关键技术之一，且论文明确涉及了数据质量与覆盖率的权衡、动态采样策略等与你关键词（如data curation, data filtering, curriculum learning）紧密相关的方法。论文质量优秀：问题定义清晰（检索模型微调的数据异构性），方法有创新（两阶段动态修剪策略），实验设计全面（跨8个数据集、6个领域，并扩展到LLM-based检索器），结果量化充分（NDCG/Recall提升、训练时间减少），结论有实践价值。尽管应用场景是检索模型而非LLM训练本身，但其方法论与你的数据选择研究方向高度一致，且论文在LLM-based检索器上的验证进一步增强了相关性。因此，它高度相关且质量突出，值得精读。
abstract_zh: 领域特定的微调对于密集检索器至关重要，但并非所有训练样本对学习过程的贡献都相同。本文介绍OPERA，一个利用这种异质性来提升检索模型适应效果与效率的数据剪枝框架。我们首先研究了静态剪枝（SP），即仅保留高相似度的查询-文档对，揭示了内在的质量-覆盖度权衡：排序指标（NDCG）提升，但检索指标（Recall）可能因查询多样性降低而下降。为解决此权衡，我们提出一种两阶段动态剪枝（DP）策略，在训练过程中自适应调节查询和文档两级的采样概率，在优先高质量示例的同时保持对完整训练集的访问。在涵盖六个领域的八个数据集上的评估表明两种方法的有效性：SP在排序上优于标准微调（NDCG@10 +0.5%），而DP在排序（NDCG@10 +1.9%）和检索（Recall@20 +0.7%）上均达到最强性能，并在所有方法中取得平均秩1.38。这些发现扩展到基于大语言模型的密集检索器Qwen3-Embedding，证实了其架构无关的益处。值得注意的是，DP在不到标准微调50%的训练时间内即可达到可比性能。
method_highlights: 提出以查询-文档对相似度作为静态剪枝（SP）的质量代理指标，直观且易于实现，但实验揭示了其固有的质量-覆盖度权衡，为后续动态方法提供了问题基线。
设计两阶段动态剪枝（DP）策略：在查询级，根据历史性能动态调整每个查询被采样的概率；在文档级，在选定查询内进一步对正例文档和负例文档进行概率调制，实现细粒度优先级控制。
核心巧妙之处在于‘动态维持完整训练集访问’：DP并非直接删除数据，而是在训练中持续调整采样分布，使模型既能聚焦高质量区域，又能通过低概率保留覆盖长尾数据，从而在收敛前缓解了SP的覆盖度损失问题。
将数据剪枝从静态一次性操作转变为与训练过程协同的在线自适应过程，使数据选择策略能随模型学习状态演化，更符合实际学习动态。
experiment_highlights: 关键权衡发现：静态剪枝（SP）显著提升排序指标（NDCG@10平均+0.5%），但普遍损害召回率（Recall@20），证实了仅依赖静态相似度会牺牲查询多样性。
动态剪枝（DP）的全面优势：在八个数据集、六个领域上，DP同时提升排序（NDCG@10 +1.9%）和检索（Recall@20 +0.7%）指标，且平均秩（1.38）显著优于所有基线，证明其平衡能力。
强泛化性验证：DP在经典编码器（如BERT）和新兴大语言模型基检索器（Qwen3-Embedding）上均有效，表明该方法不依赖于特定模型架构，具有广泛适用性。
效率突破：DP在达到与完整数据标准微调相当或更优性能时，所需训练时间减少超过50%，实现了效果与效率的双重提升。
pros: 直面核心痛点：精准识别并解决了检索模型适应中‘数据质量不均’与‘多样性需求’之间的矛盾，提供了理论洞察与实践方案。
方法简洁而深刻：DP策略设计巧妙，通过两级动态概率调制，以极小实现复杂度（仅增加采样逻辑）撬动显著性能增益，工程友好。
实证充分且具说服力：覆盖多领域、多数据集、多架构的广泛实验，结论稳健；同时提供效率分析，凸显实际应用价值。
架构无关性：证明在从传统编码器到LLM基检索器上的普适性，为未来检索模型训练提供了通用的数据优化思路。
cons: 动态策略引入超参数：DP中查询级与文档级的概率更新规则（如衰减因子、初始概率设置）可能对性能敏感，论文未深入讨论其鲁棒性或自动化调参方法。
计算开销分析不足：虽然总训练时间减少，但DP每步需维护和更新采样概率分布，其单步时间开销相比SP或标准训练的增加量未详细报告，可能在小批量或实时场景中有影响。
领域极端情况未探明：对于高度专业化或数据量极少的领域，DP的‘保持覆盖’机制是否足以避免过拟合或是否仍需人工干预，结论不够明确。
可复现性依赖细节：论文摘要未明确提及代码是否开源，且动态概率更新的具体算法细节（如如何量化‘历史性能’）需依赖正文，可能增加复现门槛。

title: Sven: Singular Value Descent as a Computationally Efficient Natural Gradient Method
authors: Samuel Bright-Thonney, Thomas R. Harvey, Andre Lukas, Jesse Thaler
abstract: We introduce Sven (Singular Value dEsceNt), a new optimization algorithm for neural networks that exploits the natural decomposition of loss functions into a sum over individual data points, rather than reducing the full loss to a single scalar before computing a parameter update. Sven treats each data point's residual as a separate condition to be satisfied simultaneously, using the Moore-Penrose pseudoinverse of the loss Jacobian to find the minimum-norm parameter update that best satisfies all conditions at once. In practice, this pseudoinverse is approximated via a truncated singular value decomposition, retaining only the $k$ most significant directions and incurring a computational overhead of only a factor of $k$ relative to stochastic gradient descent. This is in comparison to traditional natural gradient methods, which scale as the square of the number of parameters. We show that Sven can be understood as a natural gradient method generalized to the over-parametrized regime, recovering natural gradient descent in the under-parametrized limit. On regression tasks, Sven significantly outperforms standard first-order methods including Adam, converging faster and to a lower final loss, while remaining competitive with LBFGS at a fraction of the wall-time cost. We discuss the primary challenge to scaling, namely memory overhead, and propose mitigation strategies. Beyond standard machine learning benchmarks, we anticipate that Sven will find natural application in scientific computing settings where custom loss functions decompose into several conditions.
reason: 该论文提出了一种新的优化算法（Sven），属于通用神经网络训练优化方法的研究。虽然优化算法对LLM训练有间接价值，但论文内容与用户指定的两个核心研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、推测解码）无直接关联。未涉及数据筛选、质量评估、去重、课程学习等数据选择主题，也未涉及推测解码、加速推理等推理优化主题。算法本身在优化领域有一定创新性，但不符合用户当前的具体研究焦点。
abstract_zh: 我们介绍Sven（奇异值下降法），一种用于神经网络的新型优化算法，它利用损失函数可自然分解为各数据点损失之和的特性，而非在计算参数更新前将整体损失缩减为单一标量。Sven将每个数据点的残差视为需同时满足的独立条件，通过损失雅可比矩阵的摩尔-彭罗斯伪逆，寻找能一次性最优满足所有条件的最小范数参数更新。实践中，该伪逆通过截断奇异值分解近似，仅保留k个最主要方向，计算开销仅为随机梯度下降的k倍。相比之下，传统自然梯度方法计算开销与参数数量的平方成正比。我们证明，Sven可理解为推广至过参数化情形的自然梯度方法，在欠参数化极限下可恢复自然梯度下降。在回归任务中，Sven显著优于包括Adam在内的标准一阶方法，收敛更快且达到更低的最终损失，同时以较少的实际运行时间即可与LBFGS竞争。我们讨论了扩展的主要挑战——内存开销，并提出了缓解策略。除标准机器学习基准外，我们预计Sven在科学计算场景中也有天然应用，其中自定义损失函数可分解为多个条件。

title: UQ-SHRED: uncertainty quantification of shallow recurrent decoder networks for sparse sensing via engression
authors: Mars Liyao Gao, Yuxuan Bao, Amy S. Rude, Xinwei Shen, J. Nathan Kutz
abstract: Reconstructing high-dimensional spatiotemporal fields from sparse sensor measurements is critical in a wide range of scientific applications. The SHallow REcurrent Decoder (SHRED) architecture is a recent state-of-the-art architecture that reconstructs high-quality spatial domain from hyper-sparse sensor measurement streams. An important limitation of SHRED is that in complex, data-scarce, high-frequency, or stochastic systems, portions of the spatiotemporal field must be modeled with valid uncertainty estimation. We introduce UQ-SHRED, a distributional learning framework for sparse sensing problems that provides uncertainty quantification through a neural network-based distributional regression called engression. UQ-SHRED models the uncertainty by learning the predictive distribution of the spatial state conditioned on the sensor history. By injecting stochastic noise into sensor inputs and training with an energy score loss, UQ-SHRED produces predictive distributions with minimal computational overhead, requiring only noise injection at the input and resampling through a single architecture without retraining or additional network structures. On complicated synthetic and real-life datasets including turbulent flow, atmospheric dynamics, neuroscience and astrophysics, UQ-SHRED provides a distributional approximation with well-calibrated confidence intervals. We further conduct ablation studies to understand how each model setting affects the quality of the UQ-SHRED performance, and its validity on uncertainty quantification over a set of different experimental setups.
reason: 论文主题聚焦于不确定性量化在稀疏感知问题中的应用，使用浅递归解码器网络（SHRED）和engression方法，属于科学机器学习领域。与用户研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择和speculative decoding）无关键词重叠或直接关联，相关性极低，对用户研究价值有限。

title: Detecting Complex Money Laundering Patterns with Incremental and Distributed Graph Modeling
authors: Haseeb Tariq, Alen Kaja, Marwan Hassani
abstract: Money launderers take advantage of limitations in existing detection approaches by hiding their financial footprints in a deceitful manner. They manage this by replicating transaction patterns that the monitoring systems cannot easily distinguish. As a result, criminally gained assets are pushed into legitimate financial channels without drawing attention. Algorithms developed to monitor money flows often struggle with scale and complexity. The difficulty of identifying such activities is further intensified by the (persistent) inability of current solutions to control the excessive number of false positive signals produced by rigid, risk-based rules systems. We propose a framework called ReDiRect (REduce, DIstribute, and RECTify), specifically designed to overcome these challenges. The primary contribution of our work is a novel framing of this problem in an unsupervised setting; where a large transaction graph is fuzzily partitioned into smaller, manageable components to enable fast processing in a distributed manner. In addition, we define a refined evaluation metric that better captures the effectiveness of exposed money laundering patterns. Through comprehensive experimentation, we demonstrate that our framework achieves superior performance compared to existing and state-of-the-art techniques, particularly in terms of efficiency and real-world applicability. For validation, we used the real (open source) Libra dataset and the recently released synthetic datasets by IBM Watson. Our code and datasets are available at https://github.com/mhaseebtariq/redirect.
reason: 该论文的研究内容（金融洗钱检测、分布式图建模、无监督异常检测）与用户指定的研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、推测解码）在主题、方法论和应用场景上均无直接或间接关联。论文属于金融风控与图计算领域，与用户关注的LLM优化技术无关，因此相关性极低，价值有限。

title: Massively Parallel Exact Inference for Hawkes Processes
authors: Ahmer Raza, Hudson Smith
abstract: Multivariate Hawkes processes are a widely used class of self-exciting point processes, but maximum likelihood estimation naively scales as $O(N^2)$ in the number of events. The canonical linear exponential Hawkes process admits a faster $O(N)$ recurrence, but prior work evaluates this recurrence sequentially, without exploiting parallelization on modern GPUs. We show that the Hawkes process intensity can be expressed as a product of sparse transition matrices admitting a linear-time associative multiply, enabling computation via a parallel prefix scan. This yields a simple yet massively parallelizable algorithm for maximum likelihood estimation of linear exponential Hawkes processes. Our method reduces the computational complexity to approximately $O(N/P)$ with $P$ parallel processors, and naturally yields a batching scheme to maintain constant memory usage, avoiding GPU memory constraints. Importantly, it computes the exact likelihood without any additional assumptions or approximations, preserving the simplicity and interpretability of the model. We demonstrate orders-of-magnitude speedups on simulated and real datasets, scaling to thousands of nodes and tens of millions of events, substantially beyond scales reported in prior work. We provide an open-source PyTorch library implementing our optimizations.
reason: 该论文研究的是多元Hawkes过程（一种时间点过程模型）的高效并行推断算法，核心贡献在于通过并行前缀扫描实现最大似然估计的加速。论文与用户指定的两个研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、推测解码）在核心问题、方法论和应用场景上均无直接关联。尽管论文涉及并行计算和PyTorch实现，但其目标是统计模型的参数估计，而非大语言模型的训练数据管理或解码加速。因此，与用户研究方向的相关性极低，价值有限。

title: Improving Latent Generalization Using Test-time Compute
authors: Arslan Chaudhry, Sridhar Thiagarajan, Andrew Lampinen
abstract: Language Models (LMs) exhibit two distinct mechanisms for knowledge acquisition: in-weights learning (i.e., encoding information within the model weights) and in-context learning (ICL). Although these two modes offer complementary strengths, in-weights learning frequently struggles to facilitate deductive reasoning over the internalized knowledge. We characterize this limitation as a deficit in latent generalization, of which the reversal curse is one example. Conversely, in-context learning demonstrates highly robust latent generalization capabilities. To improve latent generalization from in-weights knowledge, prior approaches rely on train-time data augmentation, yet these techniques are task-specific, scale poorly, and fail to generalize to out-of-distribution knowledge. To overcome these shortcomings, this work studies how models can be taught to use test-time compute, or 'thinking', specifically to improve latent generalization. We use Reinforcement Learning (RL) from correctness feedback to train models to produce long chains-of-thought (CoTs) to improve latent generalization. Our experiments show that this thinking approach not only resolves many instances of latent generalization failures on in-distribution knowledge but also, unlike augmentation baselines, generalizes to new knowledge for which no RL was performed. Nevertheless, on pure reversal tasks, we find that thinking does not unlock direct knowledge inversion, but the generate-and-verify ability of thinking models enables them to get well above chance performance. The brittleness of factual self-verification means thinking models still remain well below the performance of in-context learning for this task. Overall, our results establish test-time thinking as a flexible and promising direction for improving the latent generalization of LMs.

abstract_zh: 语言模型（LMs）存在两种截然不同的知识获取机制：权重内学习（即在模型权重中编码信息）与上下文学习（ICL）。尽管这两种模式具有互补优势，但权重内学习通常难以对内部化知识进行演绎推理。我们将此局限性表征为潜在泛化能力的不足，逆转诅咒便是其例证之一。相反，上下文学习展现出高度稳健的潜在泛化能力。为提升权重内知识的潜在泛化，先前方法依赖于训练时的数据增强，但这些技术具有任务特异性、扩展性差，且无法泛化到分布外知识。为克服这些缺陷，本研究探索如何引导模型在测试时进行计算或‘思考’，以专门提升潜在泛化能力。我们利用基于正确性反馈的强化学习（RL）训练模型生成长思维链（CoTs）以改善潜在泛化。实验表明，此‘思考’方法不仅能解决许多分布内知识的潜在泛化失败案例，且与增强基线不同，能泛化至未进行RL的新知识。然而，在纯逆转任务上，我们发现思考无法解锁直接的知识反转，但思考模型的生成-验证能力使其表现远超随机水平。事实自验证的脆弱性意味着思考模型在此任务上的表现仍远低于上下文学习。总体而言，我们的结果确立了测试时思考作为提升LMs潜在泛化能力的灵活且富有前景的方向。

title: Learning ECG Image Representations via Dual Physiological-Aware Alignments
authors: Hung Manh Pham, Jialu Tang, Aaqib Saeed, Dong Ma, Bin Zhu, Pan Zhou
abstract: Electrocardiograms (ECGs) are among the most widely used diagnostic tools for cardiovascular diseases, and a large amount of ECG data worldwide appears only in image form. However, most existing automated ECG analysis methods rely on access to raw signal recordings, limiting their applicability in real-world and resource-constrained settings. In this paper, we present ECG-Scan, a self-supervised framework for learning clinically generalized representations from ECG images through dual physiological-aware alignments: 1) Our approach optimizes image representation learning using multimodal contrastive alignment between image and gold-standard signal-text modalities. 2) We further integrate domain knowledge via soft-lead constraints, regularizing the reconstruction process and improving signal lead inter-consistency. Extensive benchmarking across multiple datasets and downstream tasks demonstrates that our image-based model achieves superior performance compared to existing image baselines and notably narrows the gap between ECG image and signal analysis. These results highlight the potential of self-supervised image modeling to unlock large-scale legacy ECG data and broaden access to automated cardiovascular diagnostics.

title: CRIT: Graph-Based Automatic Data Synthesis to Enhance Cross-Modal Multi-Hop Reasoning
authors: Junyoung Sung, Seungwoo Lyu, Minjun Kim, Sumin An, Arsha Nagrani, Paul Hongsuck Seo
abstract: Real-world reasoning often requires combining information across modalities, connecting textual context with visual cues in a multi-hop process. Yet, most multimodal benchmarks fail to capture this ability: they typically rely on single images or set of images, where answers can be inferred from a single modality alone. This limitation is mirrored in the training data, where interleaved image-text content rarely enforces complementary, multi-hop reasoning. As a result, Vision-Language Models (VLMs) frequently hallucinate and produce reasoning traces poorly grounded in visual evidence. To address this gap, we introduce CRIT, a new dataset and benchmark built with a graph-based automatic pipeline for generating complex cross-modal reasoning tasks. CRIT consists of diverse domains ranging from natural images, videos, and text-rich sources, and includes a manually verified test set for reliable evaluation. Experiments on this benchmark reveal that even state-of-the-art models struggle on such reasoning tasks. Models trained on CRIT show significant gains in cross-modal multi-hop reasoning, including strong improvements on SPIQA and other standard multimodal benchmarks.

abstract_zh: 现实世界的推理通常需要跨模态结合信息，在文本上下文与视觉线索之间建立多跳连接。然而，大多数多模态基准测试未能捕捉这种能力：它们通常依赖于单张图像或图像集，其答案可从单一模态单独推断。这一局限性也反映在训练数据中，其中交错排列的图像-文本内容很少强制要求互补的、多跳的推理。因此，视觉-语言模型经常产生幻觉，并生成缺乏视觉证据充分支撑的推理轨迹。为了弥补这一差距，我们引入了CRIT，这是一个新的数据集和基准，采用图基自动管道构建复杂的跨模态推理任务。CRIT涵盖从自然图像、视频到文本丰富来源的多样化领域，并包含一个手动验证的测试集以进行可靠评估。在此基准上的实验表明，即使是最先进的模型也在此类推理任务上面临挑战。在CRIT上训练的模型在跨模态多跳推理方面表现出显著提升，包括在SPIQA和其他标准多模态基准上的强劲改进。
method_highlights: 核心创新是提出一个‘图基自动数据合成管道’，将知识源（图像、文本）中的实体和关系构建成异构图，并在图上自动生成需要多步、跨模态证据整合的问答对。
巧妙之处在于通过图结构显式建模‘信息缺口’，强制生成的问题必须依赖连接不同节点（不同模态、不同实体）的多跳路径才能回答，从而有效避免了现有数据集中普遍存在的‘单模态捷径’问题。
自动化流程确保了合成数据的规模与多样性，同时通过设计规则（如关系类型、跳数约束）来保证推理复杂度，解决了手动构建复杂多跳数据成本极高且难以规模化的痛点。

数据集对比：与现有的多模态推理数据集（如ScienceQA、MMMU）相比，CRIT在‘跨模态多跳’特性上更为突出，其问题平均需要3跳以上的推理，且答案无法从单一模态片段中直接抽取。
训练迁移效果：仅在CRIT训练集上微调的基础模型，在未参与训练的跨模态多跳推理基准（如SPIQA）上实现了大幅性能提升，证明了CRIT数据在提升模型泛化推理能力方面的有效性。
pros: 直击痛点：精准定位并解决了当前多模态数据集中‘跨模态多跳推理’能力缺失的核心问题，为模型训练提供了高质量、针对性的‘磨刀石’。
方法新颖高效：图基自动合成方法在保证推理复杂度的同时，实现了数据的大规模、低成本生成，为构建未来更复杂的推理基准提供了可复用的技术框架。

title: MATA-Former & SIICU: Semantic Aware Temporal Alignment for High-Fidelity ICU Risk Prediction
authors: Zhichong Zheng, Xiaohang Nie, Xueqi Wang, Yuanjin Zhao, Haitao Zhang, Yichao Tang
abstract: Forecasting evolving clinical risks relies on intrinsic pathological dependencies rather than mere chronological proximity, yet current methods struggle with coarse binary supervision and physical timestamps. To align predictive modeling with clinical logic, we propose the Medical-semantics Aware Time-ALiBi Transformer (MATA-Former), utilizing event semantics to dynamically parameterize attention weights to prioritize causal validity over time lags. Furthermore, we introduce Plateau-Gaussian Soft Labeling (PSL), reformulating binary classification into continuous multi-horizon regression for full-trajectory risk modeling. Evaluated on SIICU -- a newly constructed dataset featuring over 506k events with rigorous expert-verified, fine-grained annotations -- and the MIMIC-IV dataset, our framework demonstrates superior efficacy and robust generalization in capturing risks from text-intensive, irregular clinical time series.

title: FourierMoE: Fourier Mixture-of-Experts Adaptation of Large Language Models
authors: Juyong Jiang, Fan Wang, Hong Qi, Sunghun Kim, Jing Tang
abstract: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) has emerged as a crucial paradigm for adapting large language models (LLMs) under constrained computational budgets. However, standard PEFT methods often struggle in multi-task fine-tuning settings, where diverse optimization objectives induce task interference and limited parameter budgets lead to representational deficiency. While recent approaches incorporate mixture-of-experts (MoE) to alleviate these issues, they predominantly operate in the spatial domain, which may introduce structural redundancy and parameter overhead. To overcome these limitations, we reformulate adaptation in the spectral domain. Our spectral analysis reveals that different tasks exhibit distinct frequency energy distributions, and that LLM layers display heterogeneous frequency sensitivities. Motivated by these insights, we propose FourierMoE, which integrates the MoE architecture with the inverse discrete Fourier transform (IDFT) for frequency-aware adaptation. Specifically, FourierMoE employs a frequency-adaptive router to dispatch tokens to experts specialized in distinct frequency bands. Each expert learns a set of conjugate-symmetric complex coefficients, preserving complete phase and amplitude information while theoretically guaranteeing lossless IDFT reconstruction into real-valued spatial weights. Extensive evaluations across 28 benchmarks, multiple model architectures, and scales demonstrate that FourierMoE consistently outperforms competitive baselines in both single-task and multi-task settings while using significantly fewer trainable parameters. These results highlight the promise of spectral-domain expert adaptation as an effective and parameter-efficient paradigm for LLM fine-tuning.

abstract_zh: 参数高效微调（PEFT）已成为在有限计算预算下适应大型语言模型（LLMs）的关键范式。然而，标准PEFT方法在多任务微调设置中常显吃力，因为多样化的优化目标导致任务干扰，有限的参数预算导致表示能力不足。虽然近期方法采用混合专家（MoE）来缓解这些问题，但它们主要在空间域操作，可能引入结构冗余和参数开销。为克服这些限制，我们在频谱域重新制定适应方法。我们的频谱分析揭示，不同任务表现出不同的频率能量分布，且LLM层显示异质的频率敏感性。受这些见解启发，我们提出FourierMoE，它将MoE架构与逆离散傅里叶变换（IDFT）集成，以实现频率感知的适应。具体而言，FourierMoE采用频率自适应路由器，将令牌分派到专门处理不同频率频带的专家。每个专家学习一组共轭对称复数系数，保留完整的相位和振幅信息，同时在理论上保证无损IDFT重建为实值空间权重。在28个基准、多种模型架构和规模上的广泛评估表明，FourierMoE在单任务和多任务设置中持续优于竞争基线，同时使用显著更少的可训练参数。这些结果突显了频谱域专家适应作为LLM微调的有效且参数高效的范式的潜力。

title: LI-DSN: A Layer-wise Interactive Dual-Stream Network for EEG Decoding
authors: Chenghao Yue, Zhiyuan Ma, Zhongye Xia, Xinche Zhang, Yisi Zhang, Xinke Shen, Sen Song
abstract: Electroencephalography (EEG) provides a non-invasive window into brain activity, offering high temporal resolution crucial for understanding and interacting with neural processes through brain-computer interfaces (BCIs). Current dual-stream neural networks for EEG often process temporal and spatial features independently through parallel branches, delaying their integration until a final, late-stage fusion. This design inherently leads to an "information silo" problem, precluding intermediate cross-stream refinement and hindering spatial-temporal decompositions essential for full feature utilization. We propose LI-DSN, a layer-wise interactive dual-stream network that facilitates progressive, cross-stream communication at each layer, thereby overcoming the limitations of late-fusion paradigms. LI-DSN introduces a novel Temporal-Spatial Integration Attention (TSIA) mechanism, which constructs a Spatial Affinity Correlation Matrix (SACM) to capture inter-electrode spatial structural relationships and a Temporal Channel Aggregation Matrix (TCAM) to integrate cosine-gated temporal dynamics under spatial guidance. Furthermore, we employ an adaptive fusion strategy with learnable channel weights to optimize the integration of dual-stream features. Extensive experiments across eight diverse EEG datasets, encompassing motor imagery (MI) classification, emotion recognition, and steady-state visual evoked potentials (SSVEP), consistently demonstrate that LI-DSN significantly outperforms 13 state-of-the-art (SOTA) baseline models, showcasing its superior robustness and decoding performance. The code will be publicized after acceptance.
reason: 该论文的研究领域为脑电图（EEG）信号解码与脑机接口（BCI），核心贡献在于设计了一种用于时空特征融合的双流神经网络结构（LI-DSN）及其注意力机制（TSIA）。此内容与用户提供的两个研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、投机解码）在问题领域、技术方法和核心目标上均无任何重叠或关联。论文本身在EEG领域可能具有较高价值，但完全不属于用户关注的范围，因此对用户而言相关性极低，价值有限。

title: Enhancing the Reliability of Medical AI through Expert-guided Uncertainty Modeling
authors: Aleksei Khalin, Ekaterina Zaychenkova, Aleksandr Yugay, Andrey Goncharov, Sergey Korchagin, Alexey Zaytsev, Egor Ershov
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) systems accelerate medical workflows and improve diagnostic accuracy in healthcare, serving as second-opinion systems. However, the unpredictability of AI errors poses a significant challenge, particularly in healthcare contexts, where mistakes can have severe consequences. A widely adopted safeguard is to pair predictions with uncertainty estimation, enabling human experts to focus on high-risk cases while streamlining routine verification. Current uncertainty estimation methods, however, remain limited, particularly in quantifying aleatoric uncertainty, which arises from data ambiguity and noise. To address this, we propose a novel approach that leverages disagreement in expert responses to generate targets for training machine learning models. These targets are used in conjunction with standard data labels to estimate two components of uncertainty separately, as given by the law of total variance, via a two-ensemble approach, as well as its lightweight variant. We validate our method on binary image classification, binary and multi-class image segmentation, and multiple-choice question answering. Our experiments demonstrate that incorporating expert knowledge can enhance uncertainty estimation quality by $9\%$ to $50\%$ depending on the task, making this source of information invaluable for the construction of risk-aware AI systems in healthcare applications.
reason: 该论文的核心贡献在于利用专家分歧进行不确定性建模，以提升医疗AI的可靠性。其研究内容（医疗AI、不确定性估计、专家知识融合）与用户指定的两个研究方向（LLM训练中的数据选择、推测解码）在主题、技术目标和应用场景上均无直接关联。尽管论文本身在方法论和实验设计上看起来完整，并报告了显著的性能提升，但这并非针对用户关注的LLM训练效率或解码速度问题。因此，与用户研究方向的关联性很低，但作为一篇聚焦于医疗AI可靠性工作的论文，其方法论对特定领域（如医疗AI）仍具有一定参考价值，故评为2分。
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）系统通过加速医疗工作流程和提高诊断准确性，在医疗保健中作为第二意见系统发挥作用。然而，AI错误的不可预测性带来了重大挑战，尤其在医疗环境中，错误可能产生严重后果。一种广泛采用的保障措施是将预测与不确定性估计相结合，使人类专家能够专注于高风险病例，同时简化常规验证工作。然而，当前的不确定性估计方法仍然有限，特别是在量化由数据模糊性和噪声引起的偶然不确定性方面。为解决这一问题，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，该方法利用专家回答中的分歧来生成用于训练机器学习模型的目标。这些目标与标准数据标签结合使用，通过双重集成方法及其轻量级变体，依据总方差定律分别估计不确定性的两个组成部分。我们在二进制图像分类、二进制和多类图像分割以及多项选择题回答任务上验证了我们的方法。实验表明，根据任务不同，融入专家知识可将不确定性估计质量提升9%至50%，使这一信息来源对于构建医疗应用中具有风险意识的AI系统具有重要价值。

title: The Rank and Gradient Lost in Non-stationarity: Sample Weight Decay for Mitigating Plasticity Loss in Reinforcement Learning
authors: Zihao Wu, Hongyao Tang, Yi Ma, Jiashun Liu, Yan Zheng, Jianye Hao
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (RL) suffers from plasticity loss severely due to the nature of non-stationarity, which impairs the ability to adapt to new data and learn continually. Unfortunately, our understanding of how plasticity loss arises, dissipates, and can be dissolved remains limited to empirical findings, leaving the theoretical end underexplored.To address this gap, we study the plasticity loss problem from the theoretical perspective of network optimization. By formally characterizing the two culprit factors in online RL process: the non-stationarity of data distributions and the non-stationarity of targets induced by bootstrapping, our theory attributes the loss of plasticity to two mechanisms: the rank collapse of the Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) Gram matrix and the $\Theta(\frac{1}{k})$ decay of gradient magnitude. The first mechanism echoes prior empirical findings from the theoretical perspective and sheds light on the effects of existing methods, e.g., network reset, neuron recycle, and noise injection. Against this backdrop, we focus primarily on the second mechanism and aim to alleviate plasticity loss by addressing the gradient attenuation issue, which is orthogonal to existing methods. We propose Sample Weight Decay -- a lightweight method to restore gradient magnitude, as a general remedy to plasticity loss for deep RL methods based on experience replay. In experiments, we evaluate the efficacy of \methodName upon TD3, \myadded{Double DQN} and SAC with SimBa architecture in MuJoCo, \myadded{ALE} and DeepMind Control Suite tasks. The results demonstrate that \methodName effectively alleviates plasticity loss and consistently improves learning performance across various configurations of deep RL algorithms, UTD, network architectures, and environments, achieving SOTA performance on challenging DMC Humanoid tasks.
